text: Last class I visited a museum and talked about what my family used to do.
This week I want to invite a friend and make plans for the weekend.
Invite
Invitation
Host
Guest
Gathering
Get-together
Occasion
Accept
Turn down
Available
How about meeting for coffee on Saturday?
Why do not we have a small get-together at my place?
How about inviting Daniel too?
Why do not we meet at the cafe near the square?
Hi Tuca! Did you get my invitation to the get-together on Saturday?
I did, thank you! I would love to accept. I am available on Saturday evening.
Wonderful. How about coming over around seven? I am the host, so I will cook.
Seven sounds great. Why do not we invite Sofia too? It is a special occasion.
Good idea. I will send her an invitation. So we will be a few guests for a relaxed gathering.
Perfect. I will see you on Saturday at seven. Thank you for the lovely invitation!
Why do not we have a small get-together?
I would love to accept. I am available!
I would love to, but I have to turn it down this time.
Thank you for the lovely invitation!

Hi Tuca, it is Daniel. I hope you are doing well. I am calling because I would love to invite you to a small get-together at my place this Saturday. It is a special occasion: it is my birthday. Nothing big, just a few close friends, a relaxed evening with good food and good conversation. So, how about coming over around seven? And why don't we have dinner together, instead of just snacks? I am the host, so I will do all the cooking, which means you do not need to bring anything. Just bring yourself. I am also inviting a few other guests you know, so it will be a lovely little gathering. Please let me know if you are available, and reply by Thursday if you can, so I know how many people to cook for. I really hope you can accept. It would not be the same without you. Talk soon. Bye.

Hey Tuca, it is Sofia. Listen, you invited me to Daniel's get-together on Saturday, and I feel terrible, but I have to turn it down. I am simply not available that weekend. My sister is getting married out of town, so I will be away the whole time. I am so sad to miss the occasion, because Daniel is such a wonderful host and I love a relaxed gathering with good friends. Could you do me a favor? Please wish him a very happy birthday from me, and tell him I will celebrate with him properly when I am back. And here is an idea for the two of us: how about meeting for coffee the following week, once I am home again? I really want to hear all about the party. Let me know what works for you. Have a great time on Saturday, and give everyone my love. Bye for now.

First, Tuca got an invitation from Daniel to a get-together for his birthday. Then she replied and said she would love to accept, because she was available on Saturday. After that, Daniel suggested coming over around seven, and Tuca asked why don't we invite Sofia too. Next, Daniel said he would send Sofia an invitation, so they would be a few guests for a relaxed gathering. Finally, they agreed on the plan, and Tuca thanked him for the lovely invitation.
